summary: Created scripts/validate-manifest.sh CI script that validates manifest.md counts against actual type file row counts
keyDecisions: Placed script in scripts/ (project root) per task implementation notes
Used parallel arrays instead of associative array to avoid bash syntax errors with space-containing keys

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Script counts data rows excluding header and separator
Exit 0 on match with manifest OK message
Exit 1 on mismatch with specific category and diff
